SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.vibration

Class AcousticInducedVibrationScreening

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.vibration.AcousticInducedVibrationScreening
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class AcousticInducedVibrationScreening extends Object implements Serializable
Acoustic-induced vibration (AIV) screening calculator for piping downstream of pressure-reducing devices (relief valves, control valves, restriction orifices, blowdown valves).

Implements the Carucci & Mueller (1982) sound power level (PWL) correlation together with the Carucci & Mueller "design line" allowable PWL as a function of pipe diameter-to-thickness ratio (D/t). The screening margin between the computed PWL and the allowable PWL is mapped to a Likelihood Of Failure (LOF) band, consistent with the Energy Institute "Guidelines for the Avoidance of Vibration Induced Fatigue Failure in Process Pipework" (AVIFF).

The sound power level is computed from: 

 PWL = 10 log10[ (dP/P1)^3.6 * W^2 * (T/MW)^1.2 ] + 126.1

where W is mass flow in lb/s and T is in degrees Rankine (the original imperial form). SI inputs are converted internally. The allowable design-line PWL is: 

 PWL_allowable = 173.6 - 0.125 * (D / t)

Results are intended for screening - a PipingFivLikelihood.HIGH or PipingFivLikelihood.VERY_HIGH outcome triggers a detailed acoustic-fatigue assessment (small-bore connection management, wall-thickness increase, source treatment).

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

    Description
    private static final double
    DESIGN_LINE_INTERCEPT
    Intercept of the Carucci & Mueller design-line allowable PWL, dB.
    private static final double
    DESIGN_LINE_SLOPE
    Slope of the Carucci & Mueller design-line allowable PWL, dB per unit D/t.

    Temperature conversion factor, Kelvin to degrees Rankine.

    Mass-flow conversion factor, kg/s to lb/s.

    Additive constant in the Carucci & Mueller PWL correlation, dB.

  • Constructor Details

    • AcousticInducedVibrationScreening

      private AcousticInducedVibrationScreening()

  • Method Details

    • screen

      public static AcousticInducedVibrationResult screen(String circuitName, double massFlow, double upstreamPressure, double downstreamPressure, double temperature, double molecularWeight, double outsideDiameter, double wallThickness)
      Performs AIV screening for a gas service circuit downstream of a pressure-reducing device.
      Parameters:
      circuitName - circuit identifier
      massFlow - gas mass flow, kg/s (must be > 0)
      upstreamPressure - upstream absolute pressure P1, bara (must be > 0)
      downstreamPressure - downstream absolute pressure P2, bara (must be ≥ 0 and < P1)
      temperature - downstream temperature, K (must be > 0)
      molecularWeight - gas molecular weight, g/mol (must be > 0)
      outsideDiameter - pipe OD, m (must be > 0)
      wallThickness - pipe wall thickness, m (must be > 0)
      Returns:
      AIV screening result

    • bandFor

      public static PipingFivLikelihood bandFor(double marginDb)
      Maps a screening margin (computed minus allowable PWL) to a likelihood band.
      Parameters:
      marginDb - margin, dB
      Returns:
      likelihood band

    • recommendation

      public static String recommendation(PipingFivLikelihood band)
      Returns the recommendation for a likelihood band.
      Parameters:
      band - likelihood band
      Returns:
      recommendation text
